heading: Applicability of National Advisory Council on International Monetary and Financial Problems
label: 282b Applicability of National Advisory Council on International Monetary and Financial Problems
text: The provisions of , shall apply with respect to the Corporation to the same extent as with respect to the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development.section 286b of this title
notes: Amendments1989— struck out at end “Reports with respect to the Corporation under paragraphs 5 and 6 of subsection (b) of , shall be included in the first report made thereunder after the establishment of the Corporation and in each succeeding report.”Pub. L. 101–240section 286b of this title
